name: OnePieceFruit
short: Devil Fruit assignment + awakening companion for LevelUp.
description: Assigns random Devil Fruits at level 5, tracks awakenings at levels 15 and 30, and allows Beri-cost rerolls. Hooks into vertyco's LevelUp cog via the on_levelup event.
end_user_data_statement: Stores Discord user IDs and Devil Fruit assignment data (fruit name, type, awakening stage, reroll count) per guild.
author: UltPanda
install_msg: Thanks for installing OnePieceFruit! Make sure vertyco's LevelUp cog is also installed and loaded. Load with: [p]load onepiecefruit
